title: Meenu
body:
## What's this mod?

Meenu allows you to see other's GUI, in real time.

![Player looking at his inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E19ScOtv/images/6d2709b11840bff6a98a96f051f0c0174c55d108.png)

### Please note that mod is still under development, expect bugs and report them in our [GitHub](https://github.com/keetsta/Meenu)

this mod was inspired by [WATUT](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to) but uses different rendering and networking techniques
